---
title: "Advanced Metrics"
date: 2026-04-15
description: "Haladó mutatók a magyar kosárlabda bajnokságból: RAPM, BPM és egyéb box score metrikák."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: false
---

```{r setup}
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(crosstalk)
library(yaml)

# ── Profil URL térkép ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
build_profile_map <- function() {
  files <- list.files("jatekosok", pattern = "\\.qmd$", full.names = TRUE)
  files <- files[!grepl("^_", basename(files))]
  result <- list()
  for (f in files) {
    lines  <- readLines(f, encoding = "UTF-8", warn = FALSE)
    delims <- which(lines == "---")
    if (length(delims) < 2) next
    meta <- tryCatch(
      yaml::yaml.load(paste(lines[(delims[1]+1):(delims[2]-1)], collapse = "\n")),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(meta$profile$nev)) next
    result[[meta$profile$nev]] <- sub("\\.qmd$", ".html", paste0("jatekosok/", basename(f)))
  }
  result
}
profile_map <- build_profile_map()

# ── DB betöltés ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
con <- dbConnect(SQLite(), "bball_10_tables.db")

s_raw   <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT * FROM player_scoring_stats")
a_raw   <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT * FROM player_ast_reb_stats")
adv_raw <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT * FROM player_advanced_stats")
pi_raw  <- dbGetQuery(con, 'SELECT Játékos, Poszt, "Szül. év." AS szul_ev FROM player_info')

dbDisconnect(con)

# ── Oszlopok szelekcióval tisztítva (nincs .x/.y névütközés) ─────────────────
s_sel <- s_raw %>%
  select(Játékos, Szezon, Csapat,
         Min            = Min,
         pts_100        = `PTS 100`,
         twop_att_100   = `2P att. 100`,
         threep_att_100 = `3P att. 100`,
         fta_100        = `FT att. 100`)

a_sel <- a_raw %>%
  select(Játékos, Szezon, Csapat,
         tov_raw = TOV,
         stl_raw = STL,
         ast_100 = `AST 100`,
         tov_100 = `TOV 100`,
         orb_100 = `ORB 100`,
         drb_100 = `DRB 100`,
         blk_100 = `BLK 100`,
         pf_100  = `PF 100`)

adv_sel <- adv_raw %>%
  select(Játékos, Szezon, Csapat,
         ortg    = ORtg,
         net_rtg = `Net Rtg`,
         usg_pct = `USG%`)

raw <- s_sel %>%
  inner_join(a_sel,   by = c("Játékos", "Szezon", "Csapat")) %>%
  inner_join(adv_sel, by = c("Játékos", "Szezon", "Csapat")) %>%
  mutate(stl_100 = ifelse(tov_raw > 0, stl_raw * (tov_100 / tov_raw), NA_real_))

# ── Decay súlyok ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
decay_w <- c("2022-23" = 0.125, "2023-24" = 0.25, "2024-25" = 0.5, "2025-26" = 1.0)

# ── Ligaátlagok (200+ perces játékosok, szezonon belül) ───────────────────────
lg <- raw %>%
  filter(Min >= 200) %>%
  group_by(Szezon) %>%
  summarise(across(c(pts_100, twop_att_100, threep_att_100, fta_100,
                     orb_100, drb_100, ast_100, stl_100, blk_100, tov_100, pf_100),
                   \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), .names = "lg_{.col}"),
            .groups = "drop")

# ── Bayesian shrinkage k-értékek (empirikus ICC alapján, percben) ─────────────
# k = (1−ICC)/ICC × átlag_perc_per_szezon (≈604 perc)
# Forrás: optimize_weights.R — NB1 2022-2026 variancia-dekompozíció
k_pts    <- 125   # ICC=0.829
k_2pa    <- 110   # ICC=0.850
k_3pa    <-  90   # ICC=0.870
k_fta    <- 210   # ICC=0.741
k_orb    <- 130   # ICC=0.822
k_drb    <- 160   # ICC=0.792
k_ast    <-  95   # ICC=0.864
k_stl    <- 730   # ICC=0.454  ← leginstabilabb stat
k_blk    <- 265   # ICC=0.694
k_tov    <- 285   # ICC=0.680
k_pf     <- 160   # ICC=0.793

shrink <- function(x, lg, min, k) (min * x + k * lg) / (min + k)

per_season <- raw %>%
  left_join(lg, by = "Szezon") %>%
  mutate(
    s_pts    = shrink(pts_100,        lg_pts_100,        Min, k_pts),
    s_2pa    = shrink(twop_att_100,   lg_twop_att_100,   Min, k_2pa),
    s_3pa    = shrink(threep_att_100, lg_threep_att_100, Min, k_3pa),
    s_fta    = shrink(fta_100,        lg_fta_100,        Min, k_fta),
    s_orb    = shrink(orb_100,        lg_orb_100,        Min, k_orb),
    s_drb    = shrink(drb_100,        lg_drb_100,        Min, k_drb),
    s_ast    = shrink(ast_100,        lg_ast_100,        Min, k_ast),
    s_stl    = shrink(stl_100,        lg_stl_100,        Min, k_stl),
    s_blk    = shrink(blk_100,        lg_blk_100,        Min, k_blk),
    s_tov    = shrink(tov_100,        lg_tov_100,        Min, k_tov),
    s_pf     = shrink(pf_100,         lg_pf_100,         Min, k_pf),
    # DRE nyers és regresszált
    DRE_raw = round(
      -8.424 + 0.792*pts_100 - 0.719*twop_att_100 - 0.552*threep_att_100
      - 0.159*fta_100 + 0.135*orb_100 + 0.400*drb_100 + 0.544*ast_100
      + 1.680*stl_100 + 0.764*blk_100 - 1.360*tov_100 - 0.108*pf_100, 1),
    DRE_shr = round(
      -8.424 + 0.792*s_pts - 0.719*s_2pa - 0.552*s_3pa
      - 0.159*s_fta + 0.135*s_orb + 0.400*s_drb + 0.544*s_ast
      + 1.680*s_stl + 0.764*s_blk - 1.360*s_tov - 0.108*s_pf, 1),
    decay = decay_w[Szezon]
  )

# ── Karrierszintű wDRE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# k_DRE: DRE-szintű Bayesian shrinkage (ICC(DRE)=0.514 → k_raw=570 perc;
# konzervatív 400 perc, mert a stat-szintű shrinkage már kezelte az 1. körös zajt)
K_DRE <- 400

career <- per_season %>%
  group_by(Játékos) %>%
  summarise(
    Szn_count  = n(),
    Csapat_leg = Csapat[which.max(decay)],
    eff_min    = sum(Min * decay, na.rm = TRUE),
    wDRE_obs   = sum(DRE_shr * Min * decay, na.rm = TRUE) /
                 sum(Min    * decay,        na.rm = TRUE),
    # DRE-szintű shrinkage: eff_min / (eff_min + K_DRE) × wDRE_obs
    wDRE       = round(wDRE_obs * eff_min / (eff_min + K_DRE), 1),
    DRE_latest = DRE_shr[which.max(decay)] * eff_min / (eff_min + K_DRE),
    DRE_latest = round(DRE_latest, 1),
    szezon_leg = Szezon[which.max(decay)],
    Trend_val  = ifelse(
      Szn_count >= 2,
      round(DRE_shr[which.max(decay)] -
              weighted.mean(DRE_shr[decay < max(decay)],
                            Min[decay < max(decay)], na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── Kor és aging kiigazítás ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
pi_dedup <- pi_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(szul_ev)) %>%
  group_by(Játékos) %>%
  summarise(szul_ev = max(szul_ev, na.rm = TRUE),
            Poszt   = first(Poszt), .groups = "drop")

# Empirikus aging curve (optimize_weights.R, NB1 2022-2026, ΔDRE/szn):
# 18-21: +0.925 | 22-24: +0.330 | 25-27: +0.275 | 28-30: -0.389 | 31-33: -0.552 | 34+: -0.331
aging_delta <- function(kor) {
  case_when(
    is.na(kor)  ~ 0,
    kor <= 21   ~  0.925,
    kor <= 24   ~  0.330,
    kor <= 27   ~  0.275,
    kor <= 30   ~ -0.389,
    kor <= 33   ~ -0.552,
    TRUE        ~ -0.331
  )
}

career <- career %>%
  left_join(pi_dedup, by = "Játékos") %>%
  mutate(
    Kor      = ifelse(!is.na(szul_ev),
                      as.integer(substr(szezon_leg, 1, 4)) - szul_ev,
                      NA_integer_),
    age_adj  = pmax(pmin(aging_delta(Kor), 1.5), -2.0),
    wDRE_adj = round(wDRE + age_adj, 1)
  )

# ── Percentilis (300+ eff. perc referencia) ───────────────────────────────────
pct_rank_ref <- function(v, ref_v) {
  ref_clean <- ref_v[!is.na(ref_v)]
  ecdf(ref_clean)(v)
}

ref_mask <- career$eff_min >= 300

career <- career %>%
  mutate(
    p_wDRE_adj  = pct_rank_ref(wDRE_adj,  wDRE_adj[ref_mask]),
    p_DRE_lat   = pct_rank_ref(DRE_latest, DRE_latest[ref_mask]),
    p_trend     = pct_rank_ref(Trend_val,  Trend_val[ref_mask & !is.na(Trend_val)])
  )

# ── Trend badge ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
trend_html <- function(val) {
  ifelse(is.na(val), "\u2014",
    ifelse(val >=  1.5,
           paste0('<span style="color:#1a7a4a;font-weight:700;">\u25b2 +', val, '</span>'),
    ifelse(val <= -1.5,
           paste0('<span style="color:#C43A28;font-weight:700;">\u25bc ', val, '</span>'),
           paste0('<span style="color:#D4902A;font-weight:600;">\u25ba ', ifelse(val>=0,"+",""), val, '</span>'))))
}

# ── Megjelenítési tábla ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
make_link <- function(nev) {
  url <- profile_map[[nev]]
  if (!is.null(url))
    paste0('<a href="', url,
           '" style="color:var(--accent-dark);font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;"',
           ' onmouseover="this.style.textDecoration=\'underline\'"',
           ' onmouseout="this.style.textDecoration=\'none\'">', nev, '</a>')
  else nev
}

display <- career %>%
  filter(eff_min >= 200) %>%
  arrange(desc(wDRE_adj)) %>%
  mutate(
    Játékos_html = sapply(Játékos, make_link),
    Poszt_d      = ifelse(is.na(Poszt) | Poszt == "", "\u2014", Poszt),
    Kor_d        = ifelse(is.na(Kor), "\u2014", as.character(Kor)),
    Eff_min_d    = round(eff_min),
    DRE_lat_d    = ifelse(szezon_leg == "2025-26", as.character(DRE_latest),
                          paste0(DRE_latest, " (", szezon_leg, ")")),
    age_adj_d    = ifelse(age_adj == 0, "\u2014",
                          paste0(ifelse(age_adj > 0, "+", ""), round(age_adj, 2))),
    Trend_d      = trend_html(Trend_val)
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    Játékos   = Játékos_html,
    Csapat    = Csapat_leg,
    Poszt     = Poszt_d,
    Kor       = Kor_d,
    Szn       = Szn_count,
    `Eff. Min`  = Eff_min_d,
    `DRE (leg.)` = DRE_lat_d,
    wDRE        = wDRE,
    `Kor adj.`  = age_adj_d,
    `wDRE*`     = wDRE_adj,
    Trend       = Trend_d,
    p_wDRE_adj, p_DRE_lat, p_trend
  )

sd <- SharedData$new(display)
```

```{r render}
bg_colors <- c(
  "#F9C8C5","#FBD5C0","#FCE5C0","#FEF2D0","#FEFEE8",
  "#F0F9D5","#DBEFBD","#C2E2BB","#A5D5A8","#87C893"
)
breaks <- seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.1)

legend_html <- tags$div(
  style = paste0("display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;",
                 "font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);",
                 "font-family:Montserrat,sans-serif;margin-bottom:10px;"),
  tags$span(style = "font-weight:600;", "wDRE* percentilis:"),
  tags$span("0%"),
  tags$div(style = paste0(
    "width:160px;height:12px;border-radius:4px;",
    "background:linear-gradient(to right,",
    "#F9C8C5,#FBD5C0,#FCE5C0,#FEF2D0,#FEFEE8,",
    "#F0F9D5,#DBEFBD,#C2E2BB,#A5D5A8,#87C893);")),
  tags$span("100%")
)

method_html <- tags$details(
  style = "font-family:Montserrat,sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:#6B7280;margin-bottom:14px;",
  tags$summary(style = "cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;color:#374151;",
               "Módszertan \u25be"),
  tags$div(style = "margin-top:8px;line-height:1.7;",
    tags$b("DRE"), " (Daily RAPM Estimate, Myers 2017): box-score alapú RAPM-becslés.",
    tags$br(),
    tags$b("wDRE"), ": szezonok exponenciális decay-súlyozással (2025-26=1.0 \u2192 2022-23=0.125),
     Bayesian regresszióval (stat-specifikus k-értékekkel, ligaátlag felé).",
    tags$br(),
    tags$b("Kor adj."), ": csúcskor (26.5 év) előtt pozitív, utána negatív korrekció
     (+0.06/év alatta, \u22120.05/év felette, \u00b11.5/2.0 DRE pontban limitálva).",
    tags$br(),
    tags$b("wDRE*"), " = wDRE + kor adj. \u2014 ez a f\u0151 rendez\u0151 metrika.",
    tags$br(),
    tags$b("Trend"), ": legutóbbi szezon shrunk DRE mínusz korábbi szezons súlyozott átlaga.
     \u25b2 \u22651.5 | \u25bc \u2264\u22121.5 | \u25ba egyéb."
  )
)

controls_html <- tags$div(
  style = "display:flex;gap:20px;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;",
  tags$div(style = "min-width:160px;",
    filter_select("csapat_sel", "Csapat", sd, ~Csapat, multiple = TRUE)
  ),
  tags$div(style = "min-width:130px;",
    filter_select("poszt_sel", "Poszt", sd, ~Poszt, multiple = TRUE)
  ),
  tags$div(style = "min-width:180px;",
    filter_slider("effmin_slider", "Min. eff. perc", sd, ~`Eff. Min`,
                  min = 0, max = max(display$`Eff. Min`, na.rm = TRUE), step = 50)
  ),
  tags$div(style = "min-width:100px;",
    filter_slider("szn_slider", "Szezons", sd, ~Szn,
                  min = 1, max = max(display$Szn, na.rm = TRUE), step = 1)
  )
)

dt_base <- DT::datatable(
  sd,
  rownames  = FALSE,
  escape    = FALSE,
  selection = "none",
  options   = list(
    dom        = "ft",
    pageLength = 500,
    ordering   = TRUE,
    scrollX    = TRUE,
    language   = list(search = "Keres\u00e9s:"),
    columnDefs = list(
      list(visible   = FALSE,      targets = 11:13),
      list(className = "dt-center", targets = 2:10),
      list(className = "dt-left",   targets = 0:1)
    )
  )
)

dt_styled <- dt_base %>%
  formatStyle("wDRE*",     valueColumns = "p_wDRE_adj",
              backgroundColor = styleInterval(breaks, bg_colors)) %>%
  formatStyle("DRE (leg.)", valueColumns = "p_DRE_lat",
              backgroundColor = styleInterval(breaks, bg_colors))

tagList(
  legend_html,
  method_html,
  controls_html,
  dt_styled,
  tags$p(
    style = "font-size:11px;color:#9CA3AF;margin-top:8px;font-family:Montserrat,sans-serif;",
    "Referencia: 300+ eff. perc. Minimum megjelenítési határ: 100 eff. perc.",
    " A Bayesian regresszió k-értékei stat-specifikusak (stl/blk: k=850-950, pts: k=600, többi: k=350-550)."
  )
)
```
